questions.question: Which pages do you need? (e.g. Home, Menu, Reservations, About, Contact, Gallery, Events)
What functional features are essential? (e.g. online reservations, menu PDF/digital, loyalty programme)
How would you describe your restaurant's visual identity? (e.g. fine dining, casual bistro, street food, café)
Are there any restaurant websites you love the look of? Paste up to 3 URLs.
What are your top SEO priorities? (e.g. rank for 'Italian restaurant Colombo', 'best pizza near me')
Do you have professional food photography ready, or will we need to source/style images?
Do you use any existing systems we should integrate? (e.g. OpenTable, Resy, Toast POS, Uber Eats, Google My Business)
What is your approximate budget range for this project?
